text:
It was a sunny day. Tom was eating breakfast at his favorite diner when his friend Pat walked in. Pat looked exhausted.

"Hey Tom!" he exclaimed. "Did you hear? The doc said my knee operation was successful."

Tom put down his orange juice. "Wow, glad to hear it, Pat! Do you wanna go for a run afterwards?"

Pat grinned. "Not today, dude. The doc warned me to slow down and rest for a little bit. I have a new piece of technology attached to my knee!"

"What kind of tech?"

Pat pulled out his smartphone and showed Tom a video. It was an infomercial about a cutting-edge knee brace that promised unparalleled stability and comfort.

Tom laughed. "That's cool and all, but it doesn't fix breakfast."

"Nah, but it keeps me from falling over while I eat. And who else would you rather have around a big plate of pancakes?"

Tom nodded. "You, obviously."
